name: Md. Hadiuzzaman Bappy
about: After completing my college studies, I dove into the world of Computer Science at Khulna University.Those years were an exciting adventure, filled with opportunities to explore various areas of technology.I developed a strong passion for both development and design, particularly enjoying frontend development for websites and mobile apps. I also ventured into creating compelling brand identities that resonate with users. As I combined my love for design and development, I became increasingly enthusiastic about pursuing a career as a Product Designer (or User Interface Designer). Now, I'm eager to bring my creative energy and technical expertise to help create exceptional user experiences for your projects. Let's collaborate and make something truly remarkable!
